title: Kago Canvas Tote & Accessories Set
description: A refined everyday tote in textured cream canvas, paired with a matching wallet and detachable strap for workdays, errands, and weekend plans.

specs.Material: Textured canvas with vegan leather trim

title: Kago Noir Crossbody
description: A compact black crossbody with a structured silhouette, adjustable strap, and polished clasp for hands-free daily styling.

title: Kago Cognac City Backpack
description: A slim leather backpack with a tablet-friendly interior, top handle, and secure zipper pockets for polished commuting.

specs.Capacity: Fits a tablet and daily notebook

title: Kago Raffia Summer Tote
description: A breezy woven tote with tan handles and a drawstring pouch, made for beach days, market mornings, and travel styling.

specs.Material: Natural raffia with vegan leather handles

title: Kago Champagne Evening Clutch
description: A satin-finish mini clutch with a detachable chain strap and polished frame, sized for phone, cards, keys, and lipstick.

title: Kago Adjustable Strap Kit
description: A cream replacement strap with gold clips for refreshing your tote, crossbody, or travel bag.
